    11â†’func TestPhaseFromString(t *testing.T) {
    12â†’	t.Parallel()
    13â†’
    14â†’	tests := []struct {
    15â†’		name  string
    16â†’		input string
    17â†’		want  Phase
    18â†’	}{
    19â†’		{name: "active", input: "active", want: PhaseActive},
    20â†’		{name: "active_committed", input: "active_committed", want: PhaseActive},
    21â†’		{name: "idle", input: "idle", want: PhaseIdle},
    22â†’		{name: "ended", input: "ended", want: PhaseEnded},
    23â†’		{name: "empty_string_defaults_to_idle", input: "", want: PhaseIdle},
    24â†’		{name: "unknown_string_defaults_to_idle", input: "bogus", want: PhaseIdle},
    25â†’		{name: "uppercase_treated_as_unknown", input: "ACTIVE", want: PhaseIdle},
    26â†’	}
    27â†’
    28â†’	for _, tt := range tests {
    29â†’		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
    30â†’			t.Parallel()
    31â†’			got := PhaseFromString(tt.input)
    32â†’			assert.Equal(t, tt.want, got)
    33â†’		})
    34â†’	}
    35â†’}
    36â†’
    37â†’func TestPhase_IsActive(t *testing.T) {
    38â†’	t.Parallel()
    39â†’
    40â†’	tests := []struct {
    41â†’		name  string
    42â†’		phase Phase
    43â†’		want  bool
    44â†’	}{
    45â†’		{name: "active_is_active", phase: PhaseActive, want: true},
    46â†’		{name: "idle_is_not_active", phase: PhaseIdle, want: false},
    47â†’		{name: "ended_is_not_active", phase: PhaseEnded, want: false},
    48â†’	}
    49â†’
    50â†’	for _, tt := range tests {
    51â†’		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
    52â†’			t.Parallel()
    53â†’			assert.Equal(t, tt.want, tt.phase.IsActive())
    54â†’		})
    55â†’	}
    56â†’}

    58â†’func TestEvent_String(t *testing.T) {
    59â†’	t.Parallel()
    60â†’
    61â†’	tests := []struct {
    62â†’		event Event
    63â†’		want  string
    64â†’	}{
    65â†’		{EventTurnStart, "TurnStart"},
    66â†’		{EventTurnEnd, "TurnEnd"},
    67â†’		{EventGitCommit, "GitCommit"},
    68â†’		{EventSessionStart, "SessionStart"},
    69â†’		{EventSessionStop, "SessionStop"},
    70â†’	}
    71â†’
    72â†’	for _, tt := range tests {
    73â†’		t.Run(tt.want, func(t *testing.T) {
    74â†’			t.Parallel()
    75â†’			assert.Equal(t, tt.want, tt.event.String())
    76â†’		})
    77â†’	}
    78â†’}

    80â†’func TestAction_String(t *testing.T) {
    81â†’	t.Parallel()
    82â†’
    83â†’	tests := []struct {
    84â†’		action Action
    85â†’		want   string
    86â†’	}{
    87â†’		{ActionCondense, "Condense"},
    88â†’		{ActionCondenseIfFilesTouched, "CondenseIfFilesTouched"},
    89â†’		{ActionDiscardIfNoFiles, "DiscardIfNoFiles"},
    90â†’		{ActionWarnStaleSession, "WarnStaleSession"},
    91â†’		{ActionClearEndedAt, "ClearEndedAt"},
    92â†’		{ActionUpdateLastInteraction, "UpdateLastInteraction"},
    93â†’	}
    94â†’
    95â†’	for _, tt := range tests {
    96â†’		t.Run(tt.want, func(t *testing.T) {
    97â†’			t.Parallel()
    98â†’			assert.Equal(t, tt.want, tt.action.String())

   100â†’	}
   101â†’}
   102â†’
   103â†’// transitionCase is a single row in the transition table test.
   104â†’type transitionCase struct {
   105â†’	name        string
   106â†’	current     Phase
   107â†’	event       Event
   108â†’	ctx         TransitionContext
   109â†’	wantPhase   Phase
   110â†’	wantActions []Action
   111â†’}
   112â†’
   113â†’// runTransitionTests runs a slice of transition cases as parallel subtests.
   114â†’func runTransitionTests(t *testing.T, tests []transitionCase) {
   115â†’	t.Helper()
   116â†’	for _, tt := range tests {
   117â†’		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
   118â†’			t.Parallel()
   119â†’			result := Transition(tt.current, tt.event, tt.ctx)
   120â†’			assert.Equal(t, tt.wantPhase, result.NewPhase, "unexpected NewPhase")
   121â†’			assert.Equal(t, tt.wantActions, result.Actions, "unexpected Actions")
   122â†’		})
   123â†’	}
   124â†’}
   125â†’
   126â†’func TestTransitionFromIdle(t *testing.T) {
   127â†’	t.Parallel()
   128â†’	runTransitionTests(t, []transitionCase{
   129â†’		{
   130â†’			name:        "TurnStart_transitions_to_ACTIVE",

   134â†’			wantActions: []Action{ActionUpdateLastInteraction},
   135â†’		},
   136â†’		{
   137â†’			name:        "GitCommit_triggers_condense",

   140â†’			wantPhase:   PhaseIdle,
   141â†’			wantActions: []Action{ActionCondense, ActionUpdateLastInteraction},

   144â†’			name:        "GitCommit_rebase_skips_everything",
   145â†’			current:     PhaseIdle,
   146â†’			event:       EventGitCommit,
   147â†’			ctx:         TransitionContext{IsRebaseInProgress: true},
   148â†’			wantPhase:   PhaseIdle,
   149â†’			wantActions: nil,
   150â†’		},
   151â†’		{

   154â†’			event:       EventSessionStop,
   155â†’			wantPhase:   PhaseEnded,
   156â†’			wantActions: []Action{ActionUpdateLastInteraction},
   157â†’		},
   158â†’		{
   159â†’			name:        "SessionStart_is_noop",
   160â†’			current:     PhaseIdle,
   161â†’			event:       EventSessionStart,
   162â†’			wantPhase:   PhaseIdle,
   163â†’			wantActions: nil,
   164â†’		},
   165â†’		{
   166â†’			name:        "TurnEnd_is_noop",
   167â†’			current:     PhaseIdle,
   168â†’			event:       EventTurnEnd,
   169â†’			wantPhase:   PhaseIdle,
   170â†’			wantActions: nil,
   171â†’		},
   172â†’	})
   173â†’}
   174â†’
   175â†’func TestTransitionFromActive(t *testing.T) {
   176â†’	t.Parallel()
   177â†’	runTransitionTests(t, []transitionCase{
   178â†’		{
   179â†’			name:        "TurnStart_stays_ACTIVE",
   180â†’			current:     PhaseActive,

   190â†’			wantActions: []Action{ActionUpdateLastInteraction},

   234â†’func TestTransitionFromEnded(t *testing.T) {
   235â†’	t.Parallel()
   236â†’	runTransitionTests(t, []transitionCase{

   291â†’func TestTransitionBackwardCompat(t *testing.T) {
   292â†’	t.Parallel()
   293â†’	runTransitionTests(t, []transitionCase{

   339â†’func TestTransition_rebase_GitCommit_is_noop_for_all_phases(t *testing.T) {
   340â†’	t.Parallel()
   341â†’
   342â†’	rebaseCtx := TransitionContext{IsRebaseInProgress: true}
   343â†’
   344â†’	for _, phase := range allPhases {
   345â†’		result := Transition(phase, EventGitCommit, rebaseCtx)
   346â†’		assert.Empty(t, result.Actions,
   347â†’			"rebase should produce empty actions for phase %s", phase)
   348â†’		assert.Equal(t, phase, result.NewPhase,
   349â†’			"rebase should not change phase for %s", phase)
   350â†’	}
   351â†’}
   352â†’
   353â†’func TestTransition_all_phase_event_combinations_are_defined(t *testing.T) {
   354â†’	t.Parallel()
   355â†’
   356â†’	// Verify that calling Transition for every (phase, event) combination
   357â†’	// does not panic and returns a valid phase.
   358â†’	for _, phase := range allPhases {
   359â†’		for _, event := range allEvents {
   360â†’			result := Transition(phase, event, TransitionContext{})
   361â†’			assert.NotEmpty(t, string(result.NewPhase),
   362â†’				"Transition(%s, %s) returned empty phase", phase, event)
   363â†’
   364â†’			// Verify the resulting phase is a known phase.
   365â†’			normalized := PhaseFromString(string(result.NewPhase))
   366â†’			assert.Equal(t, result.NewPhase, normalized,
   367â†’				"Transition(%s, %s) returned non-canonical phase %q",
   368â†’				phase, event, result.NewPhase)
   369â†’		}
   370â†’	}
   371â†’}
   372â†’
   373â†’func TestApplyCommonActions_SetsPhase(t *testing.T) {
   374â†’	t.Parallel()
   375â†’
   376â†’	state := &State{Phase: PhaseIdle}
   377â†’	result := TransitionResult{
   378â†’		NewPhase: PhaseActive,
   379â†’		Actions:  []Action{ActionUpdateLastInteraction},
   380â†’	}
   381â†’
   382â†’	remaining := ApplyCommonActions(state, result)
   383â†’
   384â†’	assert.Equal(t, PhaseActive, state.Phase)
   385â†’	assert.Empty(t, remaining, "UpdateLastInteraction should be consumed")
   386â†’}
   387â†’
   388â†’func TestApplyCommonActions_UpdatesLastInteractionTime(t *testing.T) {
   389â†’	t.Parallel()
   390â†’
   391â†’	state := &State{Phase: PhaseIdle}
   392â†’	before := time.Now()
   393â†’
   394â†’	result := TransitionResult{
   395â†’		NewPhase: PhaseActive,
   396â†’		Actions:  []Action{ActionUpdateLastInteraction},
   397â†’	}
   398â†’
   399â†’	_ = ApplyCommonActions(state, result)
   400â†’
   401â†’	require.NotNil(t, state.LastInteractionTime)
   402â†’	assert.False(t, state.LastInteractionTime.Before(before),
   403â†’		"LastInteractionTime should be >= test start time")
   404â†’}
   405â†’
   406â†’func TestApplyCommonActions_ClearsEndedAt(t *testing.T) {
   407â†’	t.Parallel()
   408â†’
   409â†’	endedAt := time.Now().Add(-time.Hour)
   410â†’	state := &State{
   411â†’		Phase:   PhaseEnded,
   412â†’		EndedAt: &endedAt,
   413â†’	}
   414â†’
   415â†’	result := TransitionResult{
   416â†’		NewPhase: PhaseIdle,
   417â†’		Actions:  []Action{ActionClearEndedAt},
   418â†’	}
   419â†’
   420â†’	remaining := ApplyCommonActions(state, result)
   421â†’
   422â†’	assert.Nil(t, state.EndedAt, "EndedAt should be cleared")
   423â†’	assert.Equal(t, PhaseIdle, state.Phase)
   424â†’	assert.Empty(t, remaining, "ClearEndedAt should be consumed")
   425â†’}
   426â†’
   427â†’func TestApplyCommonActions_PassesThroughStrategyActions(t *testing.T) {
   428â†’	t.Parallel()
   429â†’
   430â†’	state := &State{Phase: PhaseActive}
   431â†’	result := TransitionResult{
   432â†’		NewPhase: PhaseIdle,
   433â†’		Actions:  []Action{ActionCondense, ActionUpdateLastInteraction},

   437â†’

   439â†’		"ActionCondense should be passed through to caller")
   440â†’	assert.Equal(t, PhaseIdle, state.Phase)
   441â†’	require.NotNil(t, state.LastInteractionTime)
   442â†’}

   459â†’func TestApplyCommonActions_WarnStaleSessionPassedThrough(t *testing.T) {

Looking at the conflicts:

**phase.go** (lines 215-260): The HEAD branch has a `transitionFromActiveCommitted` function that the main branch removed. Main removed the `ACTIVE_COMMITTED` phase entirely. I should take main's version (remove the function).

**phase_test.go** (lines 200-209): The HEAD branch has a test case for `PhaseActiveCommitted` + `GitCommit` transition that main removed. I should take main's version (remove the test case).

Let me resolve both conflicts by taking the main branch's version (removing the `ACTIVE_COMMITTED`-related code).

content.text: The conflicts are straightforward â€” main removed the `ACTIVE_COMMITTED` phase, and your branch still had it. I'll resolve by taking main's version (removing the dead code).

input.old_string:
<<<<<<< HEAD
func transitionFromActiveCommitted(event Event, ctx TransitionContext) TransitionResult {
	switch event {
	case EventTurnStart:
		// Ctrl-C recovery after commit.
		// This is a degenerate case where the EndTurn is skipped after a in-turn commit.
		// Either the agent crashed or the user interrupted it.
		// We choose to continue, and defer condensation to the next TurnEnd or GitCommit.
		return TransitionResult{
			NewPhase: PhaseActive,
			Actions:  []Action{ActionUpdateLastInteraction},
		}
	case EventTurnEnd:
		return TransitionResult{
			NewPhase: PhaseIdle,
			Actions:  []Action{ActionCondense, ActionUpdateLastInteraction},
		}
	case EventGitCommit:
		if ctx.IsRebaseInProgress {
			return TransitionResult{NewPhase: PhaseActiveCommitted}
		}
		// Don't update LastInteractionTime on self-loop: a git commit is not
		// proof the agent is alive. Only TurnStart/TurnEnd prove liveness.
		// Without this, PostCommit refreshes all sessions on every commit,
		// preventing hasAnyLiveSession from detecting truly stale sessions.
		return TransitionResult{
			NewPhase: PhaseActiveCommitted,
			Actions:  []Action{ActionMigrateShadowBranch},
		}
	case EventSessionStart:
		return TransitionResult{
			NewPhase: PhaseActiveCommitted,
			Actions:  []Action{ActionWarnStaleSession},
		}
	case EventSessionStop:
		return TransitionResult{
			NewPhase: PhaseEnded,
			Actions:  []Action{ActionUpdateLastInteraction},
		}
	default:
		return TransitionResult{NewPhase: PhaseActiveCommitted}
	}
}

=======
>>>>>>> origin/main
func transitionFromEnded
